title: attendance — field classification
description: Attendance carries mostly internal-tier structural data + a set of confidential fields tied to fraud correlation (device_fingerprint_hash, ip_address, gps) and to coach-only notes. For minor athletes, the entire attendance record inherits the regulated_minor tier for cross-tenant reads at the platform plane.

confidential: AttendanceRecord.session_notes (coach-only; never surfaced to guardian / athlete / peer)
AbsenceRecord.documented_url_signed (S3 medical note; safeguarding_officer + hr only)
regulated_minor: For attendance records of MINOR athletes: the entire record inherits the regulated_minor tier for cross-tenant reads. Platform-plane responses redact device_fingerprint_hash / ip_address / gps / signature_url_signed / session_notes.
audit_log: AttendanceRecord.consumed_pass_id (money-side signal — 7-year retention for SOX 404 tax audits)

notes: Attendance carries NO PII directly — the PII is in the linked Athlete + Session + Membership. Cross-tenant regulated_minor stripping applies transitively.
Coach notes (session_notes) are coach-only — never surfaced to guardians / athletes / peer coaches.
Device fingerprint + GPS are collected for fraud correlation, NEVER for advertising / marketing / analytics. Analytics events strip these fields.
Guardian consent for device_fingerprint + GPS capture on minor athletes is validated at check-in; refuses without consent (COPPA compliance).
The signature_url_signed field is a signed S3 URL — the signature image itself never leaves S3.
